==== expandoPropertyEmptyArrayWidening.tlua (16 errors) ====
    // https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/issues/3976
    
    local example: {
      (): void;
      items?: string[];
    } = () => undefined;
    example.items = [];
                    ~
!!! error TS1109: Expression expected.
                     
!!! error TS1011: An element access expression should take an argument.
    
    function f1() {}
    f1.a = [];  // Implicit any error
           ~
!!! error TS1109: Expression expected.
            
!!! error TS1011: An element access expression should take an argument.
    
    local f2 = function() end;
    f2.a = [];  // Implicit any error
       ~
!!! error TS2339: Property 'a' does not exist on type '() => void'.
           ~
!!! error TS1109: Expression expected.
            
!!! error TS1011: An element access expression should take an argument.
    
    local f3 = () => {};
    f3.a = [];  // Implicit any error
       ~
!!! error TS2339: Property 'a' does not exist on type '() => void'.
           ~
!!! error TS1109: Expression expected.
            
!!! error TS1011: An element access expression should take an argument.
    
    local f4: { (): void, a: string[] } = () => {};
          ~~
!!! error TS2741: Property 'a' is missing in type '() => void' but required in type '{ (): void; a: string[]; }'.
!!! related TS2728 expandoPropertyEmptyArrayWidening.tlua:18:23: 'a' is declared here.
    f4.a = [];
           ~
!!! error TS1109: Expression expected.
            
!!! error TS1011: An element access expression should take an argument.
    
    local f5: { (): void, a: string[] } = function() end;
          ~~
!!! error TS2741: Property 'a' is missing in type '() => void' but required in type '{ (): void; a: string[]; }'.
!!! related TS2728 expandoPropertyEmptyArrayWidening.tlua:21:23: 'a' is declared here.

           ~
!!! error TS1109: Expression expected.
